pageTitle.description: Heading of the Dossiers video archive page.

pageIntro.description: Intro paragraph under the Dossiers page heading.

emptyState.title.description: Heading shown on the Dossiers page when no videos have been published yet.

emptyState.body.description: Body copy shown when no videos have been published.

watchOnYoutube.description: Call-to-action on each video dossier card.
watchOnYoutube.notes: YouTube is a product name — do not translate.

openInNewTab.description: Screen-reader hint appended to external video links.

caseNumber.description: Case number label on each dossier card.
caseNumber.notes: {{value}} is the case number (e.g. 1798-A). Preserve the placeholder.

badges.caseFile.description: Badge text shown on home-page dossier cards with a case file number.
badges.caseFile.notes: {{number}} is the case file number (e.g. 081). Preserve the placeholder.

badges.perspective.description: Badge text for dossiers that are perspective pieces.

formats.fullLength.description: Format label for a full-length video dossier.

formats.investigation.description: Format label for an investigation-style dossier.

formats.deepDive.description: Format label for a deep-dive dossier.

formats.documentary.description: Format label for a documentary-style dossier.

formats.expedition.description: Format label for an expedition-style dossier.

formats.shortForm.description: Format label for a short-form dossier.

eras.politicalPanic1798.description: Era/category tag for the 1798 Sedition Act dossier.

eras.shadowDiplomacy1776.description: Era/category tag for the 1776 French Connection dossier.

eras.economicCollapse1929.description: Era/category tag for the 1929 Black Tuesday dossier.

eras.expansion1803.description: Era/category tag for the 1803 Louisiana Purchase dossier.

eras.innovation1844.description: Era/category tag for the 1844 telegraph dossier.

lincoln.title.description: Title of the Lincoln featured dossier card.
lincoln.title.notes: Lincoln is a historical figure's name — do not translate.

lincoln.summary.description: Summary of the Lincoln featured dossier card.

lincoln.imageAlt.description: Alt text for the Lincoln dossier card image.

sedition.title.description: Title of the 1798 Sedition Act featured dossier card.
sedition.title.notes: Refers to the 1798 Alien & Sedition Acts panic in the early American republic.

sedition.summary.description: Summary of the 1798 Sedition Act featured dossier card.
sedition.summary.notes: Describes the 1798 prosecutions under the Sedition Act. 'First Amendment' is a proper-noun reference to the U.S. Constitution and should not be translated.

sedition.imageAlt.description: Alt text for the 1798 Sedition Act dossier card image.

homestead.title.description: Title of the 1892 Homestead Massacre dossier.

homestead.summary.description: Summary of the 1892 Homestead Massacre dossier.
homestead.summary.notes: Andrew Carnegie is a historical figure's name — do not translate.

homestead.imageAlt.description: Alt text for the 1892 Homestead dossier image.

frenchConnection.title.description: Title of the 1776 French Connection dossier.

frenchConnection.summary.description: Summary of the 1776 French Connection dossier.

frenchConnection.imageAlt.description: Alt text for the 1776 French Connection dossier image.

blackTuesday.title.description: Title of the 1929 Black Tuesday dossier.
blackTuesday.title.notes: 'Black Tuesday' is a proper noun for the October 29, 1929 stock market crash.

blackTuesday.summary.description: Summary of the 1929 Black Tuesday dossier.

blackTuesday.imageAlt.description: Alt text for the 1929 Black Tuesday dossier image.
